base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_company — a ui from 1993 doom. Williams + id Software company screens + DOOM title. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Williams + id Software company screens + DOOM title
